description: What makes a cell 'alive' in the Athena organism

requirements.name: Addressed
requirements.description: Cell has a valid Xi108 crystal coordinate

requirements.name: Connected
requirements.description: Cell has at least one edge in the mycelium graph

requirements.name: Weighted
requirements.description: Cell has crystal weights in the weight store

requirements.name: Observable
requirements.description: Cell can be scored by the 12D meta-observer

requirements.name: Mutable
requirements.description: Cell's momentum can be updated by training

requirements.name: Compressible
requirements.description: Cell can be compressed to 1/8 seed representation

requirements.name: Recoverable
requirements.description: Cell can be regenerated from its seed
